channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Bitcoin ticks closer to $100,000 in extended surge following US elections
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Bitcoin extended its streak of record highs after ticking above $99,000 for the first time. The cryptocurrency has rocketed more than 40% in just two weeks.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Supreme Court allows multibillion-dollar class action to proceed against Meta
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Supreme Court is allowing a multibillion-dollar class action investors’ lawsuit to proceed against Facebook parent Meta, stemming from the privacy scandal involving the Cambridge Analytica political consulting firm.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: OpenAI is thinking about building its own browser
item.description: OpenAI is reportedly thinking about developing its own browser with the aim of challenging Google’s dominance in the market, according to The Information. The new browser would have built-in support for Chat GPT and Open AI’s search engine Search GPT.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Hypersonic jet promises NYC to London in under an hour
item.description: A Texas company is developing a hypersonic jet, Stargazer, that could fly from New York City to London in under an hour, redefining boundaries of aviation.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: AI agents are unlike any technology ever
item.description: The agents are coming, and they represent a fundamental shift in the role artificial intelligence plays in businesses, governments, and our lives. The biggest news in agentic AI happened this month when we learned that OpenAI’s agent, Operator, is expected to launch in January.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: In the age of AI, what is a PC? Arm has its answer
item.description: Amid the uncertainty around what makes a Windows 11 PC a Copilot+ PC, and how that differs from an AI PC, Arm is bringing some clarity — or perhaps a new source of confusion — with its definition of what constitutes an Arm PC.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Thai court dismisses activist's suit against Israeli spyware producer over lack of evidence
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — A Thai court on Thursday threw out a lawsuit brought by a pro-democracy activist which alleged spyware produced by an Israeli tech firm had been used to hack his phone.
item.dc:creator: JERRY HARMER and DAVID RISING, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Silicon Valley tech boom lifts California’s dreary budget view
item.description: A gauge of the so-called Magnificent Seven mega tech companies — Alphabet, Amazon.com Inc., Apple, Meta, Microsoft Corp., Nvidia and Tesla Inc. — is up 56% so far this year, more than twice the advance of the S&P 500 Index.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: DOJ asks judge to order Google to sell Chrome
item.description: The Department of Justice (DOJ) is asking a federal judge to order Google to sell off its Chrome browser after the court found the tech giant maintained an illegal monopoly over online search.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Innovative Robot Dogs to Combat Invasive Fire Ants: A Game-Changing Solution for Ecosystem Protection
item.description: Robot dogs equipped with AI are being trained to sniff out invasive fire ants, offering a potential solution to the environmental and economic damage caused by these pests.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Nvidia is Wall Street's most valuable company. How it got there, by the numbers
item.description: Nvidia has once again turned out quarterly results that exceeded Wall Street's forecasts. The company has seen soaring demand for its semiconductors, which are used to power artificial intelligence applications.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: RHEL AI, JBoss EAP 8 coming to Azure cloud
item.description: Red Hat will be making Red Hat Enterprise Linux AI (RHEL AI) and Red Hat JBoss Enterprise Application Platform (EAP) 8 available on Microsoft’s Azure cloud platform. Both arrangements were announced on November 19.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Comcast to spin off cable networks that were once the entertainment giant's star performers
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Comcast is spinning off into a new company many of the cable television networks that were once at the entertainment giant's heart as consumers increasingly swap out their cable TV subscriptions for streaming platforms.
item.dc:creator: MATT OTT and WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: US gathers allies to talk AI safety as Trump's vow to undo Biden's AI policy overshadows their work
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump has vowed to repeal President Joe Biden's signature artificial intelligence policy when he returns to the White House for a second term. What that actually means for the future of AI technology remains to be seen.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Google AI Chatbot Tells User to 'Please Die', Experts Weigh In
item.description: AI technology advancements, benefits, and challenges discussed by experts and celebrities.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Apple admins: Update your hardware now
item.description: Among the first things Apple IT admins woke up to this morning was news of a pair of actively exploited zero-day attacks in the wild targeting Intel Macs, iPhones, iPads, and even Vision Pro users.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Australia won't force social media users to share their personal details when child ban takes effect
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Australia's communications minister said Wednesday the government won't force social media users to hand over their personal information to tech companies, as children younger than 16 are set to be banned from the platforms.
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Azure AI Foundry tools up for changes in AI applications
item.description: The way we use artificial intelligence is changing. Chatbots aren’t going away. We’ll continue to use them to deliver basic, natural language, self-service applications.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Microsoft extends Entra ID to WSL, WinGet
item.description: Microsoft has added new security features to Windows Subsystem for Linux (WSL) and the Windows Package Manager (WinGet), including integration with Microsoft Entra ID (formerly Active Directory) for identity-based access control.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: IBM deal brings AMD Instinct accelerators to IBM Cloud
item.description: IBM is expanding its AI accelerator options for enterprise users of its cloud service. AMD Instinct MI300X accelerators are now available as a service on IBM Cloud, the vendors announced.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: A matter of time: 3 metrics that demonstrate the value of immersion cooling
item.description: Immersion cooling in the data center space gets a lot of positive attention for the formulations that enhance thermal performance, material compatibility, and durability.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: German police break up an environmental activists' camp near Tesla plant outside Berlin
item.description: BERLIN (AP) — German police broke up a protest camp housing environmental activists in a forest near the Tesla electric car factory in Grünheide outside Berlin on Tuesday, citing violations of public safety and order.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Helpful hack: Customize your home screen by adding widgets on your iPhone
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson shows you how to add, customize and manage widgets for quick access to apps and info from your iPhone home screen.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: New Chinese humanoid robot shows off its strength by lifting 35 pounds per hand
item.description: China's Shanghai Kepler Robotics has developed a new humanoid robot that can carry up to 35 pounds per hand for commercial applications across various industries
item.dc:creator: Fox News
